metadata.description: Local marketplace for the runforlife-coach plugin (multi-athlete AI running coach).

plugins.name: runforlife-coach
plugins.description: Multi-athlete AI running coach with recovery, training, race, strength/Hyrox, and analytics specialist subagents. Provides /panel, /daily-plan, /weekly-plan, /compare, /chart, /goal-status, /reflect, /note, /switch, /personality.
